请从左侧拖拽组件到此处进行数据大屏的制作: Please drag and drop components from the left to create a large data screen here
前端渲染样式用，非存储字段: Used for front-end rendering styles, non-storage fields
根据条件级关联关系,分页查询记录列表和总数: According to the condition-level association, query the record list and total number in paging
数值里的字段类型必须一致, 只能全为时间、全为非时间: The field types in the numerical values must be consistent, and can only be all time and all non time
不可以将二级分组变为一级: Secondary grouping cannot be changed to primary grouping
根据条件查询记录列表: Query record list based on conditions
批量创建或更新记录和关联关系: Create or update records and relationships in batches
批量创建或更新记录: Create or update records in batches
批量创建记录(分批次创建): Create records in batches (create in batches)
隐藏后将不能被引用，但不影响已被引用的内容；隐藏可以取消，取消隐藏后恢复隐藏前的: After hiding, it cannot be referenced, but it does not affect the content that has already been referenced; Hiding can be cancelled, and after unhiding, the function before hiding can be restored
报表名称已存在，不允许重复: The report name already exists and cannot be duplicated
由高级模式切换为快捷模式: Switch from advanced mode to shortcut mode
数据校验未通过，请修改正确后再保存: The data verification failed. Please modify it correctly before saving
根据条件查询记录总数: Query the total number of records based on conditions
发布后有更新数据大屏信息,选择新的图表: After publishing, there will be updated data on the large screen, so select a new chart
批量创建记录和关联关系: Create records and relationships in batches
创建或更新记录，返回记录数: Create or update records and return the number of records
报表已经被引用不能删除: The report has already been referenced and cannot be deleted
创建或更新记录和关联关系: Create or update records and relationships
请输入三级分组名称: enter the name of the third level group
导出文件名称,不含文件后缀: Export file name, without file suffix
更新自己及其关联数据: Update yourself and your associated data
根据条件分页查询记录列表: Query the record list by paging according to conditions
移动数据大屏的位置: The location of the mobile data screen
根据条件查询单条记录: Query a single record based on conditions
标题名称不能与父标题相同: The title name cannot be the same as the parent title
根据条件分页查询记录列表和总数: Query the record list and total number by page based on conditions
发布后有更新报表信息,更新图表内容: Updated report information and updated chart content after publication
未发布的数据大屏不可查看: Unpublished data cannot be viewed on the large screen
切换模版后数据大屏内容清空，请确认是否切换！: After switching the template, the data screen content will be cleared. Please confirm whether to switch!
漏斗图只能拖入整数 浮点数 金额的字段: Funnel chart can only be dragged into fields with integer floating point amounts
批量创建或更新记录(分批次)，返回记录数: Create or update records in batches (in batches) and return the number of records
发布后有选择新的图表: Choose a new chart after publishing
查询记录总数: Query the total number of records
如组件类型为图表则必填: Required if component type is chart
只能选择未来的时间！: You can only choose the future time!
长度不能小于: The length cannot be less than
将去掉条件中的括号和未选中行: Remove parentheses and unselected rows from the condition
存在同名的一级分组，不允许重复: There is a first level group with the same name, duplicate is not allowed
创建或更新记录，返回对象: Create or update a record and return an object
长度不能小于4!: The length cannot be less than 4!
不能添加相同数值的固定值辅助线: Cannot add fixed value guides with the same value
该参考值最多取500条数据进行计算: The reference value can be calculated using up to 500 pieces of data
请输入日期时间: Please enter the date and time
指定导出的数据大屏编码: Specify the large screen encoding of the exported data
最大支持20个字，支持汉字、大小写字母、-: Supports up to 20 characters, supports Chinese characters, upper and lower case letters, -
覆盖父类的样式表: Overriding the parent class’s style sheet
编辑态版本号为0，发布态版本是在最新版本基础上+1: The editing version number is 0, and the publishing version is +1 based on the latest version.
图表可能有编辑内容未保存，现在退出将丢失内容， 确认是否返回?: There may be editing content in the chart that has not been saved. Exiting now will lose the content. Are you sure you want to return?
指标统计图最多支持六个: The indicator statistical chart supports up to six
关联元数据别称,例如字段在页面中的标题和元数据标题不一致: Associated metadata alias, for example, the field title on the page is inconsistent with the metadata title
该辅助线已存在，不要重复添加: The auxiliary line already exists, do not add it again
获取图表默认样式: Get the default style of the chart
如气泡图的颜色: Such as the color of the bubble chart
至少必须有一个图表控件: At least one chart control must be present
建议拖入字段值个数<=10的对比字段；如果超出，则每个维度值只取前10条对比数据: Suggest dragging in a comparison field with a number of field values<=10; If it exceeds, only the top 10 comparative data will be used for display for each dimension value!
仅支持输入汉字、数字、大小写字母、空格、-: Only supports inputting Chinese characters, numbers, uppercase and lowercase letters, spaces-
只支持4-30位的字母、数字和下划线: Only supports letters, numbers, and underscores ranging from 4 to 30 digits
一屏展示维度值个数: Number of dimension values displayed on one screen
将去掉表达式中的决定运算优先级的括号: Remove the parentheses in the expression that determine the priority of the operation
数据大屏删除失败，已经被其他设计器使用: Failed to delete the data dashboard, it has been used by other designers
图表名称已存在，不允许重复: Chart name already exists, duplicate is not allowed
修改为是后图表变为默认样式（默认字号大小、字体颜色），修改为否即可切换回自定义样: Change to Yes and the chart will change to the default style (default font size, font color). Change to No to switch back to the custom style
发布后有更新数据大屏信息: Updated data and large screen information after release
根据实际需求上传组件对应的JS文件: Upload JS files corresponding to components based on actual needs
数据大屏、图表和报表的编码三传一: Coding of large data screens, charts and reports is transmitted from three to one
冗余code字段，用与数据大屏: Redundant code field, used for large data screens
展示名称的长度在1-20个字符内: The length of the display name should be between 1 and 20 characters
请选择维度字段值: Please select a dimension field value
每次生成SDK后需要下载模版工程，在其中进行开发: After each SDK generation, it is necessary to download the template project for development
大屏可能有编辑内容未保存，现在退出将丢失内容， 确认是否返回?: There may be unsaved edited content on the large screen. Exiting now will lose the content. Are you sure you want to return?
修改后会清空所有关联设置: After modification, all associated settings will be cleared
发布后有更新图表信息,更新图表内容: Updated chart information and updated chart content after publication
是否数据源过滤字段: Whether the data source filter field
展示维度值总数: Display the total number of dimension values
设置不允许别人引用时，当登陆人非创建人时，无法引用该内容: When setting not allowing others to reference, when the login person is not the creator, the content cannot be referenced
图表删除失败，已经被报表使用: Chart deletion failed, it has been used by the report
一个字段值只能被设置一次: A field value can only be set once
不可以将一级分组变为二级: It is not possible to change the first level grouping to the second level
获取图表原来样式: Get the original style of the chart
请输入一级分组名称: enter the name of the first level group
数值字段不能与维度字段重复: Numeric fields cannot be duplicated with dimension fields
年份、日期、日期时间和时间不能混合拖入数值设置区域，只能单个类型字段一起拖入: Year, date, date time, and time cannot be mixed and dragged into the numerical setting area. Only single type fields can be dragged together
数据量过大，请拖动查看！: The data volume is too large, please drag to view!
请输入二级分组名称: enter the name of the secondary group
选择图表中的数值字段: Select numerical fields in the chart
右Y轴或Y轴数值: Right Y axis or Y axis value
维度字段不能与数值字段重复: Dimension fields cannot be duplicated with numerical fields
分组名称已存在，不允许重复: The group name already exists and cannot be duplicated
图内筛选最多支持六个: Up to six filters are supported within the graph
数据大屏标题不允许为空!: The data screen title cannot be empty!
图内筛选DB字段: Filter DB fields in the chart
还未选择关联字段: No associated fields have been selected yet
根据实际需求上传组件对应的CSS文件: Upload CSS files corresponding to components based on actual needs
设置不允许别人编辑时，当登陆人非创建人时，无法编辑该内容: When setting to not allow others to edit, the content cannot be edited when the login person is not the creator
一屏展示条数: Number of display items on one screen
请输入数据大屏名称: Please enter the data screen name
图表调用方法不能为空: Chart Invocation Method Cannot Be Empty
该图表不支持多个维度: This Chart Does Not Support Multiple Dimensions
图表保存失败，计算字段未配置: Chart Save Failed, Calculated Field Not Configured
图表保存失败，计算表达式字段未配置表达式: Chart Save Failed, Expression Not Configured for Calculated Expression Field
动态输入参数以 “{}” 取值。举例：查询大于某个价格的商品列表，价格参数为 {: Dynamic params use "{}". Example: query goods over price {item_price}
图表删除失败，已经被其他设计器使用: Chart deletion failed, already used by other designers
图表 eip 接口使用模式未设置: Chart EIP API mode not set
已删除，请刷新后试试: Deleted, please refresh and try again
基础漏斗图字段设置必须为零维度多数值或者一维度一数值: Basic funnel chart field settings must be zero dimensions with multiple values or one dimension with one value
方法定义参考默认的queryPage方法，@Function.Advanced新: Method definition refers to the default queryPage method, add category = FunctionCategoryEnum.QUERY_PAGE in @Function.Advanced
非计数聚合方式时，结果字段数据类型必须和计算字段数据类型一致: For non-count aggregation methods, the result field data type must be consistent with the calculated field data type
方法定义参考默认的 queryPage 方法，@Function.Advance: Use default queryPage, add category = FunctionCategoryEnum.QUERY_PAGE
图表标题不能为空，且不能超过 20 个字: Chart title cannot be empty or exceed 20 chars
图表数值字段展示名称超出长度: Chart value field display name exceeds length
图表删除失败，已经被隐藏不能删除: Chart deletion failed, hidden and cannot be deleted
展示维度总数：仅支持输入1-5000的整数: Total number of display dimensions: Only integers 1-5000 are supported
分组下存在数据大屏，不允许删除: Data Dashboard Exists Under Group, Deletion Not Allowed
图表维度字段展示名称超出长度: Chart dimension field display name exceeds length
计数聚合方式时字段类型不匹配，请绑定整数类型字段: Field type mismatch for count aggregation method, please bind integer type field
分组下存在图表，不允许删除: Charts exist under the group, deletion is not allowed
查询数据大屏时必须传id或code: ID or code must be passed when querying data dashboard
查询数据大屏时必须传 id 或 code: ID or Code required for dashboard query
计算字段聚合方式未配置: Calculated Field Aggregation Method Not Configured
图表标题不能为空，且不能超过20个字: Chart title cannot be empty and cannot exceed 20 characters
该图表未更新，无需更新发布: This chart has not been updated, no need to republish
存在同名的二级分组，不允许重复: Duplicate secondary group name exists, not allowed
已经设置不允许别人编辑: Set to disallow editing by others
分组已删除，请刷新后试试: Group has been deleted, please refresh and try again
一屏展示条数：仅支持输入1-30的整数: Number of items per screen: Only integers 1-30 are supported
该图表只支持一个数值: This chart only supports one value
查询报表时必须传 id 或 code: ID or Code required for report query
数据可视化批量导出设计数据: Batch export design data for data visualization
查询图表时必须传id或code: ID or code must be passed when querying chart
查询报表时必须传id或code: ID or code must be passed when querying report
父级分组不存在，请刷新后试试: Parent group does not exist, please refresh and try again
动态输入参数以“{}”取值。举例：查询大于某个价格的商品列表，价格参数为{ite: Dynamic input parameters are retrieved with "{}". Example: Query the list of products with price greater than a specific value, the price parameter is {item_price}
分组下存在报表，不允许删除: Reports exist under the group, deletion is not allowed
图表数据来源类型不能为空: Chart data source type cannot be empty
该图表只支持一个维度: This chart only supports one dimension
该图表不支持多个数值: This chart does not support multiple values
数据大屏删除失败，已经被隐藏不能删除: Data dashboard deletion failed, hidden and cannot be deleted
图表删除失败，已经被数据大屏使用: Chart deletion failed, already used by data dashboards
图表eip接口使用模式未设置: Chart EIP Interface Usage Mode not set

支持汉字、数字、大小写字母、空格、-: Supports Chinese characters, numbers, uppercase and lowercase letters, spaces, and -
更换模板会清空以配置好的所有图表与组件。: Changing the template will clear all the charts and components that have been configured.
只能为汉字、数字、大小写字母和-: Can only be Chinese characters, numbers, uppercase and lowercase letters, and -
若已配置了数据计算，那么在设置数值时，仅限于选择在数据计算中已选中的字段。: If data calculation has been configured, then when setting values, only select the fields that have been selected in the data calculation.
若已配置了数据分组，那么在设置维度时，仅限于选择在数据分组中已选中的字段。: If the data group has been configured, when setting the dimension, you are limited to selecting the selected fields in the data group.
请输入小数位数: Please enter the number of decimal places
支持0-10个字,支持汉字、数字、字母、空格、-: Supports 0-10 characters, including Chinese characters, numbers, letters, spaces, and -
若报表中尚不存在图表，可选择图表中任意可引用分组；若报表中已存在图表，只能选择图: If no chart exists in report, select any referable group; if exists, only select secondary groups under chart's primary group.

图表标题不允许为空!: The chart title cannot be empty!
